problems.cause: AGREE annex is in system type but references implementation port 'Actual' instead of system port 'Actual_Speed'
problems.minimal_edit: Change 'THROT.Actual' to 'Actual_Speed' in the AGREE annex

problems.diagnostic: /CaseProject/modified_model.aadl | line 36: The types of 'Target_Speed' and 'Target' do not match.
problems.cause: AGREE annex references implementation port 'CNTRL.Target' instead of system port 'Target_Speed'
problems.minimal_edit: Change 'CNTRL.Target' to 'Target_Speed' in the AGREE annex

problems.cause: AGREE annex references implementation port 'SM.State_Out' instead of system port 'State_Signal'
problems.minimal_edit: Change 'SM.State_Out' to 'State_Signal' in the AGREE annex

executor_steps: Edit the AGREE annex in the Car system type to replace 'THROT.Actual' with 'Actual_Speed'
Edit the AGREE annex in the Car system type to replace 'CNTRL.Target' with 'Target_Speed'
Edit the AGREE annex in the Car system type to replace 'SM.State_Out' with 'State_Signal'
